creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Mon Jul 13 18:32:51 UTC 2020
New revision: 542150
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/542150

Log:
  New Port: net-mgmt/unifi-poller: Collect unifi controller data

  Unifi-poller collects your UniFi controller data and reports it to
  an InfluxDB instance, or export it for Prometheus collection.

  WWW: https://github.com/unifi-poller/unifi-poller

  PR:		247338
  Submitted by:	Anthony Brown <anthony@found-it.net>

Changes:
  head/net-mgmt/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/unifi-poller/
  head/net-mgmt/unifi-poller/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/unifi-poller/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/unifi-poller/pkg-descr
  head/net-mgmt/unifi-poller/pkg-plist
